name: JSON Transformer
summary: Transforms the incoming payload using a jq expression and emits the result.
description:
# JSON Transformer

Applies a [jq](https://jqlang.github.io/jq/) expression to the incoming payload and emits the result as a `TransformedPayload` event. Useful for reshaping, renaming, filtering, or projecting fields before passing data to the next node.

## Use cases
- Rename or flatten deeply nested JSON fields
- Project a subset of fields from a large payload
- Combine or compute fields using jq expressions
- Convert array shapes for downstream nodes

## Examples

Project fields:
```
{name: .user.name, email: .user.email}
```

Flatten nested object:
```
{id: .order.id, total: .order.payment.total, currency: .order.payment.currency}
```

Filter array elements:
```
.items[] | select(.status == "active")
```

outputs.name: TransformedPayload
outputs.description: The result of applying the jq mapping to the input payload. Shape depends on the mapping expression.

schema.description: Shape determined by the configured jq expression.

mapping.title: jq Mapping
mapping.description: A jq expression applied to the incoming payload. The result becomes the output payload.
